content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline as a foundation to instantiate the multi-perspective inconsistency sampling at the core of cutting-edge LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while boosting reflection accuracy via diverse conflicting perspectives. This hybrid framework solves the common flaw of existing Self-Refine setups that get stuck in local blind spots because they rely on the LLM's single fixed initial perspective to generate feedback.
